title: tournefortia multiflora
intro: Tournefortia multiflora, also known as the Mexican Tournefortia, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Tournefortia multiflora include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antihelmintic to treat parasitic worm infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
